content: I was home all day on October 15. My wife cooked dinner at 7:00 PM. I watched TV from 5:00 PM onwards. I didn’t drive Vikram’s SUV that day. I didn’t know Arjun was taken. I didn’t call anyone. I didn’t go near the school. I have no idea who did it. I’ve been loyal to Vikram for 8 years. I’m just a driver. I don’t know anything about money or kidnapping. My phone was dead all day — I forgot to charge it. That’s why my wife says I was home — because I was.
